    Method SetAnimationFrame

    SetAnimationFrame(int, float, bool)

    Sets the bone transforms from an animation frame.

    Declaration
    public void SetAnimationFrame(int trackLogicalIndex, float time, bool looped = true)
    Parameters
    Type Name Description
    int trackLogicalIndex

    The animation track index.
    float time

    The animation time frame.
    bool looped

    True to use the animation as a looped animation.
